name: la-compagnia-della-ghironda
description: La Compagnia della Ghironda - A medieval fantasy guild website

scripts.lint: npm run lint:html && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:js
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:js && npm run size-report
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build
scripts.size-report: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const css = fs.statSync('dist/style.min.css').size / 1024; const js = fs.statSync('dist/main.min.js').size / 1024; console.log('\n=== Bundle Size Report ==='); console.log('CSS: ' + css.toFixed(2) + ' KB'); console.log('JS: ' + js.toFixed(2) + ' KB'); console.log('Total: ' + (css + js).toFixed(2) + ' KB\n');"
scripts.dev: npm run clean && npm run test

author: La Compagnia della Ghironda
